# Dhruv Panchal

> AI/ML Researcher and Machine Learning Engineer based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. M.Tech in Machine Learning at DA-IICT (CGPA 9.58). Gold Medalist in B.E. Information Technology. Specializes in Computer Vision, Multimodal AI, Vision-Language Models, and Quantum Machine Learning.

## Quick facts

- **Full name:** Dhruv Bharatbhai Panchal
- **Role:** AI/ML Researcher · Machine Learning Engineer
- **Currently:** M.Tech in Machine Learning at Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology (DA-IICT), CGPA 9.58
- **Previous:** B.E. Information Technology, Gandhinagar Institute of Technology (Gold Medalist, CGPA 9.01)
- **Location:** Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- **Email:** dhruv.panchal27223@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://panchaldhruv27223.github.io/

## Research focus

- Computer Vision: object detection, image segmentation, satellite imagery analysis
- Multimodal AI: vision-language models combining SigLIP and Gemma
- Quantum Machine Learning: quanvolutional filters, hybrid quantum-classical CNNs
- Generative AI: agentic systems, RAG, multi-agent orchestration

## Notable projects

- [Rooftop Segmentation](https://github.com/panchaldhruv27223/Solar_Rooftop_Detection): Hybrid YOLOS + SAM pipeline for satellite imagery; achieved +23% IoU over baseline; built India-specific dataset of 5,000+ aerial tiles.
- [Vision-Language Model](https://github.com/panchaldhruv27223/Vision-Language-Model): Custom VLM combining SigLIP vision encoder and Gemma decoder with KV caching and top-p decoding.
- [QuanvolutionNet](https://github.com/panchaldhruv27223/Image_classification_by_QNN): Hybrid quantum-classical CNN reaching 81.12% accuracy on CIFAR-10 by integrating quanvolutional filters.

## Experience

- **Teaching Assistant, DA-IICT** (Jan 2025 – Dec 2025): Mentoring 350+ students through ML coursework, lab sessions, and project evaluations.
- **ML Researcher, DA-IICT Research Lab** (Aug 2024 – Dec 2025): Led hybrid pipeline development for aerial imagery segmentation, including 1,300+ manual annotations and active-learning integration.
- **Python/ML Intern, Kody Technolab Pvt. Ltd.** (Jan 2024 – Jun 2024): Engineered multimodal AI assistant with face authentication; built Keras NLP classifier with 97% accuracy across 52 intents; integrated Whisper for voice-to-query.

## Skills

Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn, NumPy, Pandas, HuggingFace, OpenCV, YOLO, DETR, Segment Anything Model (SAM), Transformers, SigLIP, Gemma, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, Agentic AI, Model Context Protocol (MCP), AWS, Docker, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Faiss, TensorBoard, Git, Linux.
